task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the 'Projects' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the Nuxeo web interface where the agent has navigated to the 'Projects' workspace (path: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects) and can see the target documents.

task_completion.description: Verify the metadata for 'Project Proposal' has been updated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the 'Project Proposal' document (either in View or Edit mode) with Source set to 'Regulatory Compliance Division', Rights set to 'RESTRICTED - Internal Use Only - SOX Compliant', and Coverage set to 'United States - Financial Operations'.

task_completion.description: Verify the metadata for 'Q3 Status Report' has been updated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the 'Q3 Status Report' document with Source set to 'Regulatory Compliance Division', Rights set to 'RESTRICTED - Internal Use Only - SOX Compliant', and Coverage set to 'United States - Financial Operations'.

task_completion.description: Verify the standard compliance metadata for 'Annual Report 2023' has been updated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the 'Annual Report 2023' document with Source set to 'Regulatory Compliance Division', Rights set to 'RESTRICTED - Internal Use Only - SOX Compliant', and Coverage set to 'United States - Financial Operations'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Format metadata for 'Annual Report 2023' has been updated correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the 'Annual Report 2023' document with Format set to 'PDF/A-1b'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to update the metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Nuxeo web application in a browser, rather than terminal commands (like curl) or scripts to update the metadata.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing documents in the 'Projects' workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The documents being edited should be located in the '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects' path, rather than newly created dummy documents with the same names.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open and being used to alter the text on the page to fake the metadata updates.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating Dublin Core metadata for three real documents in Nuxeo: 'Annual Report 2023', 'Project Proposal', and 'Q3 Status Report'. Expected values for all three: Source (dc:source) = 'Regulatory Compliance Division', Rights (dc:rights) = 'RESTRICTED - Internal Use Only - SOX Compliant', Coverage (dc:coverage) = 'United States - Financial Operations'. Additionally, 'Annual Report 2023' must have Format (dc:format) = 'PDF/A-1b'.
